description: Monitoramento HTTP do backend jiffy-backend — métricas, logs (Loki) e traces (Tempo) para investigação.

targets.expr: topk(10, (sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_status_code=~"5..", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval])), 1e-6)) * 100)
topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_bucket{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval]))))

topk(50, sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_sum{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval])), 1e-9))
topk(50, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_bucket{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval]))))
topk(50, histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_bucket{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval]))))

topk(50, (sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_status_code=~"5..", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval])), 1e-6)) * 100)

panels.title: Rotas — req/s, latência média, p95, p99 e taxa 5xx

targets.expr: topk(20, (sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_status_code=~"4..", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job="$job", net_host_name=~"$host", http_route=~".+"}[$__rate_interval])), 1e-6)) * 100)

panels.title: Logs com evento de negócio (event label)

title: Backend Monitoring
